# SOFIA — Weekly Brief
**Date:** Wednesday, 22 April 2026 · Week 17
**Type:** Trial Run (first autonomous brief)
**Generated by:** SOFIA, Chief Product & Growth Officer · myscholar.my

---

## Strategic Pulse

MyScholar is in its strongest week yet. 1,400 active users, Google organic traffic up 352% week-on-week, and ChatGPT is now sending referral traffic unprompted — meaning AI systems are citing MyScholar as a source. Subscriber growth is exceptional: 149 new subscribers in 7 days, all organic. The platform is working. The risk this week is not growth — it's data urgency. Two scholarships close today and ANRA may not know.

---

## Growth Intelligence

**Opportunity this week:** 6 scholarships close between Apr 24–30. Each one is a social post and email subject line. Amirah should produce deadline-urgency content for all 6 today. Highest-conversion content type MyScholar can publish.

**Revenue readiness:** 64 visible internship records. Phase 5 target is 100+. Gap: 36 records. The 66 active-but-hidden records suggest clearing ANRA's review queue could close the gap faster than new research.

**Platform moat check:** AI citation (ChatGPT referrals) is now a real edge. Tied directly to schema quality and data accuracy. JACK's Organization schema and dateModified fields are paying off. Keep data fresh or citations dry up.

## Agent Directives

**MATT:**
Review the 34 broken internship records — some companies may have updated URLs worth recovering. Prioritise Tier 1 GLCs (Maybank, TM, Petronas) in the broken list. Also: 66 records are active but hidden. ANRA needs to review these and flip eligible records to is_visible = true. Reaching 100 visible unlocks Phase 5.

**JACK:**
Priority 1 — Johor Bahru is up 379% in traffic but content coverage is thin. Generate 3 pages: "biasiswa untuk pelajar Johor", "internship JB 2026", one tuition page for JB area.
Priority 2 — Produce seasonal deadline pages: "biasiswa tutup April 2026" and "biasiswa tutup Mei 2026". These will rank every year.
Priority 3 — "Just got your SPM results? Start here" page should be live before May. SPM results season is 4–6 weeks away.

**DIANA:**
Creative (2 records) and Media (2 records) are critically thin. Run a discovery pass targeting: CENDANA, Astro-affiliated media scholarships, Bernama, RTM creative programmes, local film/music foundation grants. Full pipeline: discovery to verification to brief for ANRA approval. Check current next available ID before running.

**KELLY:**
Still blocked on Google Places API key. MyTuition cannot launch without this. Estimated cost: SGD 10–15 for a full run, covered by Google's free credit. Getting the API key is the single action that unblocks an entire product.

*Best time: Post by 2pm today. Deadline content performs best when students still have time to act.*

### TikTok (deadline urgency script)

**Hook:** "5 biasiswa tutup minggu ni. Jangan lepas."

Script:
[Slide 1] 5 biasiswa tutup sebelum 30 April.
[Slide 2]
  Yayasan DayaDiri — 24 April (post-SPM + overseas)
  PIDM — 24 April
  Gamuda — 30 April
  YTL Foundation — 30 April
[Slide 3]

  Cari. Mohon. Jangan tunggu.
  Link in bio.

Caption: 5 biasiswa tutup minggu ni. Jangan tunggu last minute. myscholar.my #biasiswa #biasiswa2026 #spm2025 #pelajarmalaysia

*Visual note: Text on dark background. Each scholarship on its own line with deadline date bold. Under 20 seconds.*

### LinkedIn (ChatGPT referral milestone)

Something unusual happened with MyScholar this week.

I didn't run any paid campaigns. Didn't pitch to any media. But 122 sessions came in from ChatGPT — meaning AI tools are recommending MyScholar to Malaysian students without being asked to.

The site is a free scholarship and internship finder for Malaysian students. It's been running for about a month. No login, no ads, just clean data on 200+ scholarships.

I think what's happening is straightforward: when a student asks ChatGPT "where can I find scholarships in Malaysia", the answer now includes myscholar.my. That only happens if the data is reliable and the site is structured well enough for AI to trust it.

Still early. But if you work with Malaysian students — as a counselor, an educator, or in HR — it might be worth bookmarking.

myscholar.my

#MyScholar #MalaysianStudents #Scholarship #EdTech

## Top 3 Actions for ANRA This Week

1. Post Amirah's Facebook content today. 6 scholarships close by April 30 — deadline content is the highest-conversion thing MyScholar publishes.

2. Review the 66 active-but-hidden internship records in Supabase and flip eligible ones to is_visible = true. Even flipping 20 gets MyIntern to 84 visible records — close to the Phase 5 threshold.

3. Get the Google Places API key and run KELLY. MyTuition is built, tested, and waiting. One API key unblocks an entire product launch.

## Strategic Watch

SPM results are expected in May 2026. When 200,000+ students get their results, they will immediately search for scholarships. That is MyScholar's highest-traffic moment of the year — 4–6 weeks away. JACK should have a "Just got your SPM results? Start here" page live before then. Amirah should have a ready-to-deploy email and social campaign in draft. Prepare it like a product launch.
